summary: The chapter begins with news of Exale joining the 'Eronimo Mercenaries' and an urgent mission developing. Ha-Jin has a brief encounter with Ms. Rachel and later observes Yu Yeon-Ha receiving a valuable wild ginseng. A critical phone call then reveals that Chae Jin-Yoon, previously comatose, has moved a finger in the hospital. Ha-Jin consults the 'Book of Truth' to discover a 'Seed of the Devil' residing within Chae Jin-Yoon, which has not yet fully germinated. Faced with this revelation and a looming deadline of about half a year, Ha-Jin concludes he must kill Chae Jin-Yoon.
key_moments: News circulates that Exale has joined the 'Eronimo Mercenaries', hinting at an upcoming mission.
Yu Yeon-Ha is gifted a valuable five-year-old wild ginseng.
Ha-Jin receives an urgent call reporting that Chae Jin-Yoon, who was believed to be incapacitated, has moved a finger at the DAEHYEON Hospital.
Ha-Jin uses the 'Book of Truth' to confirm the presence of a 'Seed of the Devil' within Chae Jin-Yoon and determines he must kill him within approximately half a year.
